title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXXXV. Natural History.
content:
Bah, bah, black sheep,
            Have you any wool?
        Yes, marry, have I,
            Three bags full:
        One for my master,
            And one for my dame,
        But none for the little boy
            Who cries in the lane.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DLXXXV. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
